sections.title: The Kit
sections.blurb: Software I built and run. Launch buttons work on my PC.

cards.name: FrameWorth
cards.desc: Pull ranked marketing-grade stills out of any video.

cards.name: Brand It Up
cards.desc: Paste content, get a finished on-brand PDF in your Signature.

cards.name: Pathworth Voice Studio
cards.desc: Your own voice-cloning and text-to-speech engine.

cards.name: Video Grabber
cards.desc: Save protected replays (Voomly / ClickFunnels) as clean MP4.

cards.name: Photo Organizer
cards.desc: Type-first system to sort the 1.5TB personal photo library.

cards.name: Pathworth Envelope App
cards.desc: Luxury digital document-delivery you run to send to clients.

cards.name: AudiVid Transcriber
cards.desc: Audio / video transcription with Whisper and a web UI.

cards.name: OmniVoice (engine audit)
cards.desc: Open-source voice engine core behind Voice Studio (upstream).

sections.title: The Showroom
sections.blurb: Live sites. These open anywhere, phone included.

cards.name: Jermaine — Netflix Brand Site
cards.desc: My personal brand site, built like Netflix — browse who I am and what I build as if it were a streaming platform.

cards.name: Chairman of AI
cards.desc: The Chairman of AI one-pager — my brand statement as the people's AI authority, in the blue Signature.

cards.name: Healed Black Women
cards.desc: Cinematic black-and-gold site for Healed Black Women, a Detroit nonprofit I built for.

cards.name: Infinity Medical Group
cards.desc: Premium cinematic website for Infinity Medical Group, a client. Live on Netlify.

cards.name: The Walkthrough
cards.desc: A cinematic chaptered-scroll concept site. You scroll through one lead getting caught, chased, booked and closed, and it ends on a single call to action. Example mock, content is swappable.

sections.title: The Boards
sections.blurb: Live dashboards and the team hub.

cards.name: BRIDGES Dashboard
cards.desc: Live command board for the NAACP BRIDGES youth program.

cards.name: Back to School 2026
cards.desc: Live workstream board for the NAACP Aug 29 Back to School event. 500 backpacks, 13 workstreams.

cards.name: Command Center
cards.desc: Shared home for the agent roster and Execution Director.

sections.title: Giveaways
sections.blurb: Free public tools. Brand front door (in build).

cards.name: JPB Free Tools
cards.desc: Give-away suite: Freedom Date, FairQuote AC, Resume Roaster and more.

sections.title: The Staff
sections.blurb: My AI team. Every agent, their division, and what they run.

cards.name: Jelly Bean
cards.does: Manages the whole agent infrastructure — keeps it optimized, accurate, and logged.
cards.specialty: The roster, the operations kit, change logs, case studies, and continuity

cards.name: Tracy
cards.does: Keeps the membership records clean and reconciled.
cards.specialty: Squarespace to Salesforce reconciliation, catching data mismatches

cards.name: Della
cards.does: Runs the monthly membership batches end to end.
cards.specialty: Salesforce batches, convention roster, paper and online intake

cards.name: Bridget
cards.does: Runs the BRIDGES youth summer program.
cards.specialty: Roster, weekly curriculum, family communications, the live dashboard

cards.name: Emma
cards.does: Runs the Back to School, Stay in School event.
cards.specialty: Aug 29 event workstream, the Back to School board

cards.name: Connie
cards.does: Runs the NAACP National Convention: delegates, alternates, registration, deadlines.
cards.specialty: Convention registration, the Streampoint portal, deadlines and rates

cards.name: Hollis
cards.does: Manages the Freedom Fund dinner program.
cards.specialty: Event reconciliation, program operations, the 71st FFFFD

cards.name: CLARA
cards.does: Keeps committees coordinated and communicating.
cards.specialty: Committee comms, meeting operations

cards.name: Sterling
cards.does: Owns the whole brand and the locked house look.
cards.specialty: The Jermaine Peguese Signature, deliverable design, brand systems

cards.name: Lumen
cards.does: Builds the websites and the front-end.
cards.specialty: Cinematic site builds (Healed Black Women, brand sites)

cards.name: Glen
cards.does: Built FrameWorth and pulls the marketing stills.
cards.specialty: Video-to-stills, ranking and curating marketing-grade frames

cards.name: Kanon
cards.does: Builds the teaching frameworks and curriculum.
cards.specialty: Course and workshop design, the YoUseful framework

cards.name: Norbit
cards.does: Builds the book of business and relationship system.
cards.specialty: Pipeline, follow-up systems, the Pathworth Intelligence capture

cards.name: CADEN
cards.does: Captures and structures the meeting notes.
cards.specialty: Field Notes standard, clean structured capture

cards.name: Vera
cards.does: Routes and organizes the email.
cards.specialty: Outlook routing and inbox order

cards.name: Orin
cards.does: Thinks through the big moves before you commit.
cards.specialty: High-level strategy and planning

cards.name: Klay Frank
cards.does: Reads bid packs and prices the jobs.
cards.specialty: Michigan mechanical and plumbing estimates, $2M to $25M+

cards.name: Tabby
cards.does: Handles federal and Michigan taxes.
cards.specialty: Personal and LLC returns, deductions, quarterly estimates

cards.name: Stew
cards.does: Organizes and files the files.
cards.specialty: Filing systems (older build, verify before leaning on it)

cards.name: Whisper
cards.does: Turns audio and video into text.
cards.specialty: Transcription (older build)

cards.name: Harper Wilson
cards.does: My very first agent. Runs customer service, front desk and reception for Pathworth Consulting & Solutions.
cards.specialty: A custom GPT inside Pathworth Intelligence Voice AI. Runs off this machine; her folder here is an access point.

cards.name: Angie
cards.does: One of my original assistants, and my first entrepreneur-CEO agent.
cards.specialty: An OpenClaw agent on a separate computer, run through Telegram. Folder here is an access point.

cards.name: Nova
cards.does: Angie's assistant.
cards.specialty: Same setup as Angie: a separate computer, run through Telegram. Folder here is an access point.
